race.comment: I AM LOUIE (1) only narrowly went down over this course and distance last time out and this is not an overly strong affair. Drawn to get all the favours from the inside marble and looks the one they all have to run down. PARADISE AS USUAL (7) has been thereabouts in Saturday grade of late and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Can make her presence felt. RUSTY TYCOON (4) will be rock-hard fit for this and must be respected out of the Heathcote yard. Top-three prospects. OUR MATE LOCKY (3) has placed over this mile journey and may trouble the judge with any luck in running. BACETTI (5) next in line with the 1.5kg claim.
